home.intro1: I'm a software developer and a Junior at the American University of Phnom Penh.
home.intro2: I love building web applications, small web-based games, and other software programs.

items.title: Software Developer Intern
items.description: Managed two internal web application development projects for the bank. Worked on full-stack development with HTML, CSS, JavaScript, Node.js, MongoDB, and AWS S3.

items.title: Full-Stack Developer Trainee
items.description: Assisted senior developers in building web-based applications with Laravel. Worked on full-stack development with PHP, Blade, MySQL, Git, and Bootstrap.
Completed high school with focus on STEM subjects such as mathematics, science, and technology

items.degree: Bachelor of Science in Software Development
items.description: Currently pursuing a degree related with software development and architectural design
